prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `2f767503`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 package for `2f767503`. The verifier in [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2f767503/verifier.py#L4) finds the middle `5`, casts a ray in the direction opposite the adjacent `9`, and turns every `4`-component intersecting that ray into `7`. I used the Opus hint as the starting point and discarded the Sonnet hint in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2f767503/notes.md#L1) because it incorrectly described a rectangular recoloring rule. The generator in [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2f767503/generator.py#L92) explicitly builds the marker, 1-3 on-ray target components, and several off-ray distractor components; no new shared primitive was needed. Package wiring is in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_2f767503/__init__.py#L1).

Verification passed end-to-end: `4/4` official examples, build of `1000` generated examples, and `1000/1000` generated-example verification. I also visually checked the generated sheets against the originals and the family looks on-distribution.
